name: 19_system_b_boundary_return_equals_arm
description: Branch 3 / System B boundary: current_return EXACTLY equals bleed_arm. The arm clause uses `<=`, so equality MEETS the condition.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 0.0 >= cross 2.0 FALSE -> vwap_ticks reset. System B: current_return -1.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 is TRUE (`<=` inclusive) -> bleed_ticks = 0+1 = 1; bleed_broken = (1 >= 3) = False. Returns (0, 1, False, False). Boundary pin: System B uses `<=`.
